data.name: Add Global Password
data.value: 添加全局密码

data.name: Add New Roles
data.value: 添加新角色

data.name: Add New Users
data.value: 添加新用户

data.name: Allows approving or rejecting any leave application, regardless of the reporting line, and viewing any user's leave history.
data.value: 允许审批或拒绝任何请假申请，不受汇报线限制，并可查看任何用户的请假记录。

data.name: Allows approving or rejecting any leave application, regardless of the reporting line.
data.value: 允许批准或拒绝任何请假申请，不受汇报线限制。

data.name: Allows assigning or removing roles for any user.
data.value: 允许为任何用户分配或移除角色。

data.name: Allows creating and managing all contracts for the company.
data.value: 允许创建和管理公司的所有合同。

data.name: Allows creating and managing onboarding task templates for new employees.
data.value: 允许创建和管理新员工入职任务模板。

data.name: Allows creating contracts for the company. Every user can view public contracts by default
data.value: 允许为公司创建合同。默认情况下，所有用户均可查看公开合同。

data.name: Allows creating new global passwords that can be shared with others.
data.value: 允许创建可以与他人共享的新全局密码。

data.name: Allows creating questions, questionnaires, and viewing feedback responses.
data.value: 允许创建问题、问卷调查以及查看反馈回复。

data.name: Allows creating, editing, and deleting weekly reports on behalf of any other user.
data.value: 允许代表任何其他用户创建、编辑和删除周报。

data.name: Allows creating, updating, and deleting blueprints. Every user can view blueprints by default.
data.value: 允许创建、更新和删除蓝图。默认情况下，每个用户都可以查看蓝图。

data.name: Allows creating, updating, and deleting company entity information.
data.value: 允许创建、更新和删除公司实体信息。

data.name: Allows creating, updating, and deleting company entity information. Every user can view company entity information by default.
data.value: 允许创建、更新和删除公司实体信息。默认情况下，所有用户均可查看公司实体信息。

data.name: Allows creating, updating, and deleting services and DNS providers. Every user can view services by default.
data.value: 允许创建、更新和删除服务及DNS提供商。默认情况下，每个用户都可以查看服务。

data.name: Allows issuing and managing payroll slips for all users.
data.value: 允许为所有用户发放和管理工资单。

data.name: Allows managing and deleting any global password created by any user.
data.value: 允许管理并删除由任何用户创建的全局密码。

data.name: Allows managing the company's financial accounts and recording transactions.
data.value: 允许管理公司的财务账户并记录交易。

data.name: Allows managing the company's IT assets and intangible assets (like domains, licenses), including categories, models, and individual items. Also allows assigning and recovering assets to/from employees.
data.value: 允许管理公司的IT资产和无形资产（如域名、许可证），包括类别、型号和单个资产。同时也允许将资产分配给或从员工处收回资产。

data.name: Allows managing the company's IT assets, including categories, models, and individual items.
data.value: 允许管理公司的IT资产，包括类别、型号和单个物品。

data.name: Allows managing the company's IT assets, including categories, models, and individual items. Also allows assigning and recovering assets to/from employees.
data.value: 允许管理公司的IT资产，包括类别、型号和单个物品。同时也允许将资产分配给员工或从员工处回收资产。

data.name: Allows modification of role names and their assigned permissions.
data.value: 允许修改角色名称及其分配的权限。

data.name: Allows modification of user details like email and roles, and can also reset user passwords.
data.value: 允许修改用户信息，例如邮箱和角色，也可重置用户密码。

data.name: Allows modification of user details like email and roles, resetting user passwords, and viewing sensitive user details like payroll.
data.value: 允许修改用户详细信息（如邮箱和角色），重置用户密码，以及查看包括工资在内的敏感用户详情。

data.name: Allows printing employment and income certificates for any employee.
data.value: 允许为任何员工打印雇佣和收入证明。

data.name: Allows printing employment and income certificates for oneself.
data.value: 允许打印本人的在职和收入证明。

data.name: Allows the permanent deletion of roles.
data.value: 允许永久删除角色。

data.name: Allows the permanent deletion of user accounts.
data.value: 允许永久删除用户账户。

data.name: Allows the user to create their own weekly reports.
data.value: 允许用户创建自己的周报。

data.name: Allows the user to fill out and submit feedback questionnaires.
data.value: 允许用户填写并提交反馈问卷。

data.name: Allows viewing all company contracts, including those marked as private.
data.value: 允许查看公司的所有合同，包括标记为私密的合同。

data.name: Allows viewing all company contracts, including those marked as private. Everyone can view public contracts by default
data.value: 允许查看所有公司合同，包括标记为私有的合同。默认情况下，所有用户都可以查看公开合同。

data.name: Allows viewing and modifying global application settings.
data.value: 允许查看和修改全局应用设置。

data.name: Allows viewing system-level information and settings.
data.value: 允许查看系统级信息和设置。

data.name: Allows viewing the background job dashboard and managing jobs.
data.value: 允许查看后台任务仪表板并管理任务。

data.name: Allows viewing the list of all permissions and their assignments to roles and users.
data.value: 允许查看所有权限及其分配给角色和用户的列表。

data.name: Allows viewing the list of all users.
data.value: 允许查看所有用户的列表。

data.name: Allows viewing the list of roles and their assigned permissions.
data.value: 允许查看角色列表及其分配的权限。

data.name: Allows viewing the operation logs of any user, including their bank card change history.
data.value: 允许查看任何用户的操作日志，包括其银行卡变更历史。

data.name: Allows viewing the report line of any user, including their manager, subordinates, and peers.
data.value: 允许查看任何用户的汇报线，包括其上级、下属及平级。

data.name: Allows viewing, editing, and deleting any user's SSH keys.
data.value: 允许查看、编辑和删除任何用户的 SSH 公钥。

data.name: Approve Any Leave
data.value: 审批任何请假

data.name: Approve Project Requirements
data.value: 审批项目需求

data.name: Allows approving, rejecting, or requesting changes for project requirements. Everyone can submit requirements and comment on them.
data.value: 允许对项目需求进行同意、拒绝或要求变更的操作。所有人都可以提交需求并发表评论。

data.name: Assign Roles to Users
data.value: 为用户分配角色

data.name: Create and manage company contracts
data.value: 创建和管理公司的合同

data.name: Create company contracts
data.value: 创建公司合同

data.name: Create Weekly Report
data.value: 创建周报

data.name: Delete Roles
data.value: 删除角色

data.name: Delete Users
data.value: 删除用户

data.name: Edit and View Details of Users
data.value: 编辑并查看用户详情

data.name: Edit Role Information
data.value: 编辑角色信息

data.name: Edit User Information
data.value: 编辑用户信息

data.name: Grants permission to create new roles.
data.value: 授予创建新角色的权限。

data.name: Grants permission to create new user accounts.
data.value: 授予创建新用户账户的权限。

data.name: Grants permission to restart the application instance. May cause availability interruptions but all settings and cache will be reloaded.
data.value: 授予重启应用程序实例的权限。可能导致服务中断，但所有设置和缓存都将重新加载。

data.name: Manage Any Password
data.value: 管理任何密码

data.name: Manage anyone's weekly report
data.value: 管理任何人的周报

data.name: Manage Assets
data.value: 管理资产

data.name: Manage Blueprints
data.value: 管理蓝图

data.name: Manage Company Entity Information
data.value: 管理公司基本实体信息

data.name: Manage Feedback
data.value: 管理反馈

data.name: Manage Global Settings
data.value: 管理全局设置

data.name: Manage Leave
data.value: 请假管理

data.name: Manage Ledger
data.value: 管理账簿

data.name: Manage Onboarding Tasks
data.value: 管理入职任务

data.name: Manage Payroll
data.value: 管理薪资

data.name: Manage Services
data.value: 管理服务

data.name: Manage SSH Keys
data.value: 管理 SSH 公钥

data.name: Print Certificates
data.value: 打印证书

data.name: Print Self Certificates
data.value: 打印个人证明文件

data.name: Read Permissions
data.value: 读取权限

data.name: Read Roles
data.value: 查看角色

data.name: Read Users
data.value: 查看用户

data.name: Reboot This App
data.value: 重启此应用

data.name: Submit Feedback
data.value: 提交反馈

data.name: View any company contract, including private ones
data.value: 查看公司的任意合同，包含私密合同

data.name: View Background Jobs
data.value: 查看后台任务

data.name: View Report Line
data.value: 查看汇报线

data.name: View System Context
data.value: 查看系统上下文

data.name: View User Operation Log
data.value: 查看用户操作日志
